name: map2d
description: Navigate a course as a full-bleed 2D lecture map (a tactical game screen with unlock paths). A course shell — pass it to <CurriculumHost pack={map2dPack} />. Copies an author-editable map component into src/lesson/map2d — no new npm dependencies.

skill.loadWhen: a course should be shown as a 2D map / game screen with unlock progression (a <CurriculumHost>), rather than a linear document list
